items.caption: A scene from a hospital's intensive care unit (icu) during a pandemic. medical workers, dressed in protective suits, are attending to patients who are lying in hospital beds. the workers are focused on their tasks, and the patients appear to be receiving care. the hospital is equipped with various medical devices and machines, and the environment is sterile and well-lit. the setting suggests a time of crisis, as indicated by the protective suits and the number of patients in the unit.
